channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Elon Musk cannot sell any SpaceX shares for a year—then all restrictions lift at once
item.description: The rocket maker's gated stock-sale structure is designed to prevent billions of shares from crashing the stock price.

item.title: Airbnb offered $750 to Americans to host during the World Cup—mostly women took it and now earn thousands
item.description: The average short-term rental host will earn $3,000 for renting out their space during the World Cup, with women seizing the opportunity.

item.title: We are in a new era: Trump's $2.2 billion income haul, the Big Player Theory, and when the president becomes the bubble
item.description: In the age of AI, Syracuse University's Robert Koppl, creator of 'big player theory,' told Fortune we have 'augmented ignorance.'

item.title: Iranian officials who survived assassination attempts attend funeral of late Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: Iranian state media showed Gen. Ahmad Vahidi at a meeting about Khamenei's funeral, seated beside his casket.
